name: Hadwins Volkswagen
message: Volkswagen has a reputation for developing vehicles that offer something for everyone. From the ever-popular Volkswagen Golf through to the bold and stylish Volkswagen Tiguan, the manufacturer is renowned for its ability to fuse exceptional performance with great aesthetics. At Hadwins Volkswagen in the Lake District, we’re delighted to be able to offer the complete selection of new cars from Volkswagen at our beautifully located dealership.  Every model in the Volkswagen new car range provides a first-class driving experience. Plus, with such iconic models as the Golf, Polo, and Beetle still turning heads out on the roads, you can be confident of finding a new car from the marque that ticks all the boxes in terms of style and performance. It setting in Lindale is the perfect location to discover the latest lineup of models.
